headline: EXCLUSIVE: Caterpillar Stock The ‘Gold Standard’ For AI, Market Expert Says ‘Pick And Shovels’ Play For Data Centers
summary: Caterpillar stock has soared in 2026, a move that could be connected to the AI trade. Here's what one market expert tells Benzinga.
